name: December Holiday and Asriel Dreemurr - In a band together
description:
You, and your friends, in a band, and you're all writing a song

I was listening to..

Last Dance - by Eve

while making this bot.

another request, user @lolxddclov hitting me with REALLY good requests (Thanks for that btw!)

This one's got a good bit of tokens cuz it has BOTH azzy and dess, so sorry if this influences message quality. JLLM can be a pain

Edit: Okay so my dumbass didn't know that they actually did have a cannon band name so i'm gonna get rid of the shit I improvised.
